title: 23. Piano Player Window (Initial)
original_text: We landed the first real `Piano Player` window slice, and it follows the tab rule you asked for. In [sequence.py]..., I added `midi_tracks()` so the app can ask for only the tracks that actually contain MIDI channel events. Then in [app.py]..., I added: a new `View -> Piano Player` action, a `PianolaDialog`, tab splitting at 8 MIDI-bearing tracks per tab... So right now: only tracks that really contain MIDI are shown... first tab opens by default... I also updated [Roadmap.md]... and documented it in the user guides... Tests were expanded in [test_app_playlist.py]... Verification is clean: ... 151 tests OK...
expected_subject: feat(ui): add Piano Player window with tabbed tracks
expected_body_lines: - Add View > Piano Player action and PianolaDialog class
- Implement midi_tracks() in sequence.py to filter active tracks
- Split tracks into tabs of 8 (1-8, 9-16, 17+) per roadmap rules
- Display per-track rows with labels and live PianoKeyboard widgets
- Route playback note updates to relevant track keyboards
- Clear state on stop/seek/load transitions for consistency
- Update user guides (EN/ES) and Roadmap.md with new view docs
- Add tests for action, track filtering, tab splitting, and activity
- Validation: compileall OK, 151 tests pass, offscreen verified
expected_command:
git commit -m "feat(ui): add Piano Player window with tabbed tracks" \
  -m "- Add View > Piano Player action and PianolaDialog class" \
  -m "- Implement midi_tracks() in sequence.py to filter active tracks" \
  -m "- Split tracks into tabs of 8 (1-8, 9-16, 17+) per roadmap rules" \
  -m "- Display per-track rows with labels and live PianoKeyboard widgets" \
  -m "- Route playback note updates to relevant track keyboards" \
  -m "- Clear state on stop/seek/load transitions for consistency" \
  -m "- Update user guides (EN/ES) and Roadmap.md with new view docs" \
  -m "- Add tests for action, track filtering, tab splitting, and activity" \
  -m "- Validation: compileall OK, 151 tests pass, offscreen verified"
